content.speakerText: Great, thanks! I’ll pick them up on Thursday.
content.speakerTextCn: 太好了，谢谢！我周四来取。
expectedAnswers: Thanks a lot! See you Thursday!
I really appreciate it. Have a wonderful day!
Cool, thanks! Looking forward to it!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确回应了对方的感谢和周四见面计划
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确，无中式英语
表达自然度：语气是否礼貌、自然，符合英语口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'thanks', 'see you', 或 'appreciate' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I’m checking out now. Thanks for your service!
content.speakerTextCn: 我现在退房了，谢谢你的服务！
expectedAnswers: You’re welcome! Have a safe journey!
Thank you for staying with us! Have a great day!
My pleasure! Hope to see you again soon!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应感谢并表达良好祝愿
语言准确性：是否使用正确时态和搭配，如 'have a safe journey'
表达自然度：是否避免机械背诵，语气真诚自然
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'welcome', 'thank you', 'have a...' 等道别高频表达

expectedAnswers: Thanks for coming! See you next time!
Have a nice day! Come back soon!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰完成道别互动，不冷场
语言准确性：语法是否正确，无严重错误
表达自然度：是否使用口语化但礼貌的表达，如 'take care', 'see you next time'
关键词覆盖：是否使用 'bye', 'take care', 'see you', 'have a...' 等道别核心短语
